raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and performative declaration of identity transformation",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "identity is malleable and can be deliberately altered in real time",
    "certain social or personal roles are optional and can be discarded without loss",
    "self-love and evolution are simultaneously achievable",
    "future identity states can be directly accessed or embodied in the present"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a set of metaphorical affirmations; consistent framing of identity as programmable and fluid with no logical contradictions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker finds the language motivating, the statements align with actionable behavioral changes, and they support psychological flexibility rather than avoidance",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statements are taken as literal mechanisms rather than metaphors, or they encourage denial of stable traits, past patterns, or external constraints"
}
